Title: Successful user registration with valid credentials
Preconditions:
- User is on the U-environment (homepage).
- No existing account with the provided email.
Test Data:
- First Name: "John"
- Last Name: "Doe"
- Email: "john.doe@example.com"
- Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Confirm Password: "SecurePass123!"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Register activity** from U-environment.
2. Enter first name, last name, email, password, and confirm password.
3. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System validates inputs and accepts registration.
- User receives a confirmation message (e.g., "Registration successful!").
- User is redirected to **Login activity** or **Profile** activity.
- Notification Center logs the registration event (if applicable).

Title: Registration failure with invalid email format
Test Data:
- First Name: "John"
- Last Name: "Doe"
- Email: "john.doe@example" (missing @domain)
- Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Confirm Password: "SecurePass123!"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Register activity**.
2. Enter invalid email and other valid fields.
3. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects registration with an error message: "Invalid email format."
- User remains on the registration page with highlighted invalid field.

Title: Registration failure with mismatched passwords
Test Data:
- First Name: "John"
- Last Name: "Doe"
- Email: "john.doe@example.com"
- Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Confirm Password: "SecurePass123" (missing '!')
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Register activity**.
2. Enter mismatched passwords and other valid fields.
3. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects registration with an error: "Passwords do not match."
- User remains on the registration page with highlighted password fields.

Title: Registration failure with existing email
Preconditions: - A user with email "john.doe@example.com" already exists in the system.
Test Data:
- First Name: "John"
- Last Name: "Doe"
- Email: "john.doe@example.com" (duplicate)
- Password: "NewPass123!"
- Confirm Password: "NewPass123!"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Register activity**.
2. Enter existing email and new password.
3. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects registration with an error: "Email already registered."
- User remains on the registration page.

Title: Successful login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Login activity** from U-environment.
2. Enter valid email and password.
3. Click "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System authenticates user successfully.
- User is redirected to **Profile** or **U-environment** (homepage).
- Notification Center logs the login event (if applicable).

Title: Login failure with incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Login activity**.
2. Enter valid email and incorrect password.
3. Click "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects login with an error: "Invalid email or password."
- User remains on the login page.

Title: Login failure with non-existent email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Login activity**.
2. Enter non-existent email and any password.
3. Click "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects login with an error: "Invalid email or password."
- User remains on the login page.

Title: Subscribe to newsletter with valid email
Preconditions: - User is logged in or on the U-environment.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Newsletter activity**.
2. Enter valid email in the subscription field.
3. Click "Subscribe" button.
Expected Result:
- System confirms subscription: "You have subscribed to our newsletter!"
- Email is added to the newsletter database (verified via **Newsletter management**).
- Notification Center sends a confirmation email (if applicable).

Title: Newsletter subscription failure with invalid email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Newsletter activity**.
2. Enter invalid email.
3. Click "Subscribe" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects subscription with an error: "Invalid email format."
- User remains on the newsletter page.

Title: Create a new event with valid details
Test Data:
- Event Name: "Tech Conference 2023"
- Date: "2023-12-15"
- Time: "09:00 AM"
- Location: "Online"
- Description: "Annual tech conference with keynote speakers."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Create event** from U-environment.
2. Fill in all event details.
3. Click "Create Event" button.
Expected Result:
- System creates the event successfully.
- User sees a confirmation: "Event created successfully!"
- Event appears in **Join/View event** list.
- Notification Center notifies subscribed users (if applicable).

Title: Event creation failure with missing required field
Test Data:
- Event Name: "" (empty)
- Date: "2023-12-15"
- Time: "09:00 AM"
- Location: "Online"
- Description: "Annual tech conference."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Create event**.
2. Leave "Event Name" field empty and fill others.
3. Click "Create Event" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects creation with an error: "Event name is required."
- User remains on the event creation page with highlighted missing field.

Title: Successfully join an existing event
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Event "Tech Conference 2023" exists and is public.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Join/View event**.
2. Select the event from the list.
3. Click "Join Event" button.
Expected Result:
- System confirms joining: "You have joined Tech Conference 2023!"
- Event appears in user’s joined events list in **Profile**.
- Notification Center sends a confirmation to the user (if applicable).

Title: Attempt to join a non-existent event
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Join/View event**.
2. Search for the non-existent event.
3. Click "Join Event" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error: "Event not found."
- User remains on the event list page.

Title: Update user profile with valid data
Test Data:
- Current Password: "SecurePass123!" (for verification)
- New First Name: "Jonathan"
- New Last Name: "Smith"
- New Email: "john.smith@example.com"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Profile** activity.
2. Enter current password for verification.
3. Update first name, last name, and email.
4. Click "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result:
- System updates profile successfully.
- User sees a confirmation: "Profile updated successfully!"
- Changes reflect in **Profile** activity and **Login activity** (email).
- Notification Center logs the profile update (if applicable).

Title: Profile update failure with incorrect current password
Preconditions: - User "john.doe@example.com" is logged in with password "SecurePass123!".
Test Data:
- Current Password: "WrongPass123!" (incorrect)
- New First Name: "Jonathan"
- New Last Name: "Smith"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Profile**.
2. Enter incorrect current password and new details.
3. Click "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects update with an error: "Current password is incorrect."
- User remains on the profile page with unchanged data.

Title: Admin adds a new newsletter content
Test Data:
- Title: "Summer Sale 2023"
- Content: "Enjoy 50% off on all products this summer!"
- Publish Date: "2023-06-01"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Newsletter management**.
2. Enter title, content, and publish date.
3. Click "Publish" button.
Expected Result:
- System publishes the newsletter.
- Admin sees a confirmation: "Newsletter published successfully!"
- Newsletter appears in **Newsletter activity** for subscribers.
- Notification Center sends the newsletter to all subscribed users.

Title: Admin fails to publish newsletter with empty content
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to **Newsletter management**.
2. Enter title and publish date but leave content empty.
3. Click "Publish" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects publication with an error: "Content cannot be empty."
- Admin remains on the newsletter management page.

Title: View flash activity content
Preconditions: - A flash activity (e.g., "Announcement: New Features") is available.
